英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾
zh.Twyford, Buckinghamshire, England: 英國巴金哈姆爾特易福德
zh.Weston Turville, Buckinghamshire, Englan: 英國巴金哈姆爾韋斯頓 圖維爾
英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾特易福德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Giffard於1345年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾特易福德時，他的父親John Giffard44歲，母親Lucy de Morteyn40歲。他於1361年與Elizabeth Missenden在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾特易福德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1394年9月在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾享年49歲，埋葬在英國巴金哈姆爾韋斯頓 圖維爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Giffard于1345年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾特易福德时，他的父亲John Giffard44岁，母亲Lucy de Morteyn40岁。他于1361年与Elizabeth Missenden在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾特易福德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1394年9月在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾享年49岁，埋葬在英国巴金哈姆爾韋斯頓 圖維爾。

nameMeanings.name: Giffard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: (i) relationship name from the Continental Germanic personal name Gifard. (ii) nickname, perhaps sometimes from Old French giffard ‘chubby-cheeked, bloated’.

variants.name: Jeffords
meanings: English: variant of Gifford , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Guiver
meanings: English: (i) nickname, apparently from Middle English giver ‘giver, donor, bestower’. (ii) variant of Giffard with voicing of /f/ to /v/ and loss of final -d.

variants.name: Gafford
meanings: English (southeastern): assimilated form of Gatford, a name of various origins. In Sussex and Surrey it is perhaps a variant of the habitational name Catford from a place so called in Somerset. Gatford is also from the habitational names Gateford (in Worksop, Nottinghamshire) or Gateforth (near Selby, Yorkshire), both formed with Old English gāt ‘goat’ + ford ‘ford’, influenced by Old Norse geit ‘goat’.

Probably also an altered form of German Gaffert: habitational name from Gaffert near Köslin, Brandenburg, or from a personal name formed with Middle High German gate ‘fellow, companion’. The surname Gaffert is very rare in Germany.

English: perhaps an altered form of Gatewood , an occupational name for a ‘goatherd’ (Middle English gate-werde, Old English gātweard) or for a ‘gate keeper’ (Middle English gateward, Old English ʒeatweard, dialect gātward).

variants.name: Gifford
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Giffard, either from the Middle English personal name Gifard, derived from an Old French name of this form deriving from ancient Germanic geb- ‘give, gift’ + hard- ‘hardy, brave’, or perhaps sometimes a nickname from Old French gif(f)ard ‘chubby-cheeked, bloated’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Giffard was born in 1345, in Twyford, Buckinghamshire, England, his father, John Giffard, was 44 and his mother, Lucy de Morteyn, was 40. He married Elizabeth Missenden in 1361, in Twyford, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in September 1394, in Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 49, and was buried in Weston Turville, Buckinghamshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Giffard est né en 1345, à Twyford, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, John Giffard, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Lucy de Morteyn, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Missenden en 1361, à Twyford, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé en septembre 1394, à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterré à Weston Turville, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Giffard 1345 in Twyford, Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Giffard 44 und seine Mutter Lucy de Morteyn 40. Er hat 1361 in Twyford, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Missenden geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb im September 1394 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Weston Turville, Buckinghamshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Giffard è nato il nel 1345 nel Twyford, Buckinghamshire, England, il suo padre, John Giffard, aveva 44 anni e il suo madre, Lucy de Morteyn, aveva 40 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Missenden nel 1361, nel Twyford, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel settembre 1394, nel Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolto a Weston Turville, Buckinghamshire, England.

イギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアトウイフォード
ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Giffardが1345年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアトウイフォードで生まれた時，父John Giffardは44歳，母Lucy de Morteynは40歳であった。1361年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアトウイフォードでElizabeth Missendenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1394年9月にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアで49歳で死去し，イギリスブクインガムシュアイアウエストン トゥルヴィルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Giffard(이)가 1345년 영국 벅잉함실르 트w이퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Giffard(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Lucy de Morteyn(은)는 40세였다. 그는 1361년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 트w이퍼드에서 Elizabeth Missenden(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1394년 9월 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 벅잉함실르 웨스턴 터르빌에 묻혔다.

Twyford, Buccingahamscir, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Giffard nasceu em 1345, em Twyford, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Giffard, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Lucy de Morteyn, tinha 40 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Missenden em 1361, em Twyford, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em setembro de 1394, em Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 49 anos, e foi sepultado em Weston Turville, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Giffard родился в 1345 г. в местности твифорд, буккингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Giffard было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Lucy de Morteyn, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Missenden в 1361 г. в местности твифорд, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер сентябрь 1394 г. в местности буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 49 лет и был похоронен в местности вестон турвилл, буккингхамшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas Giffard nació en 1345, en Twyford, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Giffard, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Lucy de Morteyn, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Missenden en 1361, en Twyford, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en septiembre de 1394, en Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultado en Weston Turville, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra.
